title: Homecraft Forever
description: A feature-rich modpack for friends, combining Create-based automation, exploration, and quality-of-life enhancements.
body:
![Factories & Friends Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/536923ea2874a95f307d71961e22dcb9f8235a45.png)

# 🏡 Welcome to Homecraft Forever

A community-driven modpack made for friends to build, explore, and have fun together. Blending Create automation, epic adventures, and cozy building tools, it’s designed to keep survival fresh and unforgettable.

## 🏭 Factories & Friends

The world of Homecraft Forever just got busier! This update adds:

- 🎨 **Handcrafted -** stylish blocks and furnishings to give your factories personality.
- 🦊 **Critters & Companions + Ribbits -** otters, red pandas, frogs and more to liven up your world.
- ⚙️ **Create Addons -** new machinery, tools, and ore excavation for bigger and better factories.

Factories have never looked so good - or had so many friends running around them.

## ⭐ Features

### ⚙️ Automation & Engineering

At the heart of this pack is the Create mod and its many expansions — Power Loader, Enchantment Industry, Slice & Dice, Trading Floor, Bells & Whistles, Copycats+ and more. Build complex contraptions, automate farming, trade with style, and push your creativity further than ever before.

### 🏰 Exploration & Adventure

Discover a world filled with reimagined structures thanks to YUNG’s Better series: Strongholds, Dungeons, Mineshafts, Nether Fortresses, Ocean Monuments, Jungle Temples, Desert Temples, End Islands, Bridges, and more. Each structure is carefully redesigned for better exploration, loot, and challenge.

### 🎒 Survival & Utility

Enjoy smoother gameplay and helpful tools for everyday survival:

- Sophisticated Backpacks & Storage Drawers for ultimate inventory control.
- Farmer’s Delight & Create: Food for cooking and farming variety.
- Nature’s Compass for finding biomes with ease.
- Artifacts & Accessories to expand your gear options.
- Jade, JEI, and Shulker Box Tooltip for better item management.

### 🏡 Building & Decoration

Unleash your creativity with Macaw’s Furniture, Another Furniture, Chisel Reborn, and Every Compat. Combined with Continuity, your builds will look better than ever.

### 🎧 Quality of Life & Immersion

- Simple Voice Chat for multiplayer communication.
- Sound Physics Remastered & Iris Shaders for a more immersive atmosphere.
- Xaero’s Minimap & World Map to never get lost again.
- Chat Heads, Mouse Tweaks, and AppleSkin for small but impactful improvements.

### 🚀 Performance & Stability

Powered by Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and Distant Horizons, this pack runs smoothly while handling large worlds and massive builds.
